segments.text: After these things Yahweh’s word came to Abram in a vision, saying,
Don’t be afraid, Abram. I am your shield, your exceedingly great reward.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Abram said,
Lord[^15] Yahweh, what will you give me, since I go childless, and he who will inherit my estate is Eliezer of Damascus?
segments.speaker: Abram

segments.text: Abram said,
Behold, you have given no children to me: and, behold, one born in my house is my heir.
segments.speaker: Abram

segments.text: Behold, Yahweh’s word came to him, saying,
This man will not be your heir, but he who will come out of your own body will be your heir.
segments.speaker: Abram

segments.text: Yahweh brought him outside, and said,
Look now toward the sky, and count the stars, if you are able to count them.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He said to Abram,
So your offspring will be.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He believed in Yahweh, who credited it to him for righteousness.
He said to Abram,
I am Yahweh who brought you out of Ur of the Chaldees, to give you this land to inherit it.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He said,
Lord Yahweh, how will I know that I will inherit it?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He said to him,
Bring me a heifer three years old, a female goat three years old, a ram three years old, a turtledove, and a young pigeon.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: He brought him all these, and divided them in the middle, and laid each half opposite the other; but he didn’t divide the birds.
The birds of prey came down on the carcasses, and Abram drove them away.
When the sun was going down, a deep sleep fell on Abram. Now terror and great darkness fell on him.
He said to Abram,
Know for sure that your offspring will live as foreigners in a land that is not theirs, and will serve them. They will afflict them four hundred years.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I will also judge that nation, whom they will serve. Afterward they will come out with great wealth;
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: but you will go to your fathers in peace. You will be buried at a good old age.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: In the fourth generation they will come here again, for the iniquity of the Amorite is not yet full.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: It came to pass that, when the sun went down, and it was dark, behold, a smoking furnace and a flaming torch passed between these pieces.
In that day Yahweh made a covenant with Abram, saying,
I have given this land to your offspring, from the river of Egypt to the great river, the river Euphrates:
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: the land of the Kenites, the Kenizzites, the Kadmonites,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: the Hittites, the Perizzites, the Rephaim,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: the Amorites, the Canaanites, the Girgashites, and the Jebusites.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
